artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a sinister carnival calliope organ, its brass pipes and grinning painted scrollwork lit hot gold and carnival red, belching ribbons of dread-music and ember sparks into the smoky night air above tattered striped tents. It only knows one song, and the song is one of dread. The towering pipe-organ rises through the wide frame, neon glinting below. Wide 4:3 landscape, Rakdos red, smoky black, and hot gold, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Calliope of Doom
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, hum a tune out loud. For as long as you keep humming (you may stop whenever you like), creatures you control get +1/+0. The moment you stop, the music dies and so does the bonus.
{2}, {T}: Calliope of Doom deals 2 damage to any target. The pipes shriek a discordant waltz.
flavorText: It only knows one song. The song is also one of dread.

extras.physicalAction: hum a tune; bonus lasts as long as you keep humming
